title: Opinion: Opinion | The China Shock 2.0 May Already Be Here
summary_full: According to the IMF, China's total non-financial sector debt has climbed to roughly 313% of GDP and is projected to reach 323% by 2026.
summary_public: According to the IMF, China's total non-financial sector debt has climbed to roughly 313% of GDP and is projected to reach 323% by 2026.
